Reasoning
Q1
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Eight people A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting
around a rectangular table in such a way three
persons are sitting on the each longer side of the
table and one person is sitting on the each
shorter side of the table. All of them are facing
outside the table. All the information is not
necessarily in the same order.
D sits third to the left of H and sits opposite to A.
A and C sit near to each other. C does not sit on
the shorter side of the table. There are two
people sitting between C and G. The number of
people sitting between G and H is the same
number of people sitting between G and B. F sits
third to the left of E.
Four of the following five are alike in a certain
way and so form a group. Which one does not
belong to that group?
(A) D-B
(B) H-F
(C) E-D
(D) G-F
(E) None of these
Q2
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Eight people A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting
around a rectangular table in such a way three
persons are sitting on the each longer side of the
table and one person is sitting on the each
shorter side of the table. All of them are facing
outside the table. All the information is not
necessarily in the same order.
D sits third to the left of H and sits opposite to A.
A and C sit near to each other. C does not sit on
the shorter side of the table. There are two
people sitting between C and G. The number of
people sitting between G and H is the same
number of people sitting between G and B. F sits
third to the left of E.
How many people sit between F and E ?
(A) Three
(B) Two
(C) Five
(D) Either (a) or (c)
(E) None of these
Q3
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Eight people A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting
around a rectangular table in such a way three
persons are sitting on the each longer side of the
table and one person is sitting on the each
shorter side of the table. All of them are facing
outside the table. All the information is not
necessarily in the same order.
D sits third to the left of H and sits opposite to A.
A and C sit near to each other. C does not sit on
the shorter side of the table. There are two
people sitting between C and G. The number of
people sitting between G and H is the same
number of people sitting between G and B. F sits
third to the left of E.
What is the position of D with respect to E ?
(A) Third right
(B) Second left
(C) Second right
(D) Five to the right
(E) None of these
Q4
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Eight people A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting
around a rectangular table in such a way three
persons are sitting on the each longer side of the
table and one person is sitting on the each
 
Rectangle Arrangements

shorter side of the table. All of them are facing
outside the table. All the information is not
necessarily in the same order.
D sits third to the left of H and sits opposite to A.
A and C sit near to each other. C does not sit on
the shorter side of the table. There are two
people sitting between C and G. The number of
people sitting between G and H is the same
number of people sitting between G and B. F sits
third to the left of E.
Which of the following sit second to the left of F
?
(A) G
(B) A
(C) H
(D) C
(E) None of these
Q5
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Eight people A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting
around a rectangular table in such a way three
persons are sitting on the each longer side of the
table and one person is sitting on the each
shorter side of the table. All of them are facing
outside the table. All the information is not
necessarily in the same order.
D sits third to the left of H and sits opposite to A.
A and C sit near to each other. C does not sit on
the shorter side of the table. There are two
people sitting between C and G. The number of
people sitting between G and H is the same
number of people sitting between G and B. F sits
third to the left of E.
Which of the following statements is true ?
(A) E sits second to the right of C
(B) F sit near to D
(C) One person sit between E and F
(D) G sits on shorter side of the rectangular table
(E) None of these
Q6
Directions : Study the following information
carefully and answer the questions given
below:
Eight persons A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting
around a rectangular table and facing the centre.
They are sitting like that four of them on corners
and four of them middle on the edges. B is facing
G.G is on the middle of the edge. E is 3 to the
right of A. The number of person between A and
B (if starts counting from the left of A) is same as
F and G (if starts counting from the left of F). E is
not neighbor of G or B. D is immediate right of H.
C is not neighbor of B.
How many persons sit between E and G if starts
counting from the left of E?
(A) None
(B) 1
(C) 2
(D) 3
(E) 4

B (if starts counting from the left of A) is same as
F and G (if starts counting from the left of F). E is
not neighbor of G or B. D is immediate right of H.
C is not neighbor of B.
Which of the following pair is sitting opposite to
each other?
(A) E-A
(B) F-C
(C) A-F
(D) H-B
(E) B-D

Q11
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are
arranged in a rectangular field so that two
persons sit on each side of the table, but not
necessarily in the same sequence. They are all
facing the inside. W sits third to the left of U, who
is sitting on the longer side. S is at W's immediate
right. R sitting immediate left of P, who is not
facing Q. T sitting second to the left of S and
third to the right of V, who is not opposite T.
 
How many persons, counting from the right of
U, are there between R and U?
(A) One
(B) Two
(C) Three
(D) Four
(E) None of these

Eight persons P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are
arranged in a rectangular field so that two
persons sit on each side of the table, but not
necessarily in the same sequence. They are all
facing the inside. W sits third to the left of U, who

right. R sitting immediate left of P, who is not
facing Q. T sitting second to the left of S and
third to the right of V, who is not opposite T.
 
What is the position of V with respect to Q?
(A) Second to the right
(B) Third to the right
(C) Immediate right
(D) Fourth to the left
(E) None of these

Q16
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle of the side
of the table. All the information is not necessarily
in the same order. Only three persons sit
between V and R. W sits immediate left of S. S
sits second to the left of V, who is not sitting at
the corner of the table. The number of persons
sitting between S and Q is the same as the
number of persons sitting between T and S. The
one who sits opposite V is immediate right of Q.
P sits second to the right of W. U sits immediate
right of T but do not sit on the longer side of the
table.
 
How many persons sit between S and R when
counted to the right of R?
(A) One
(B) Two
(C) Three
(D) Four
(E) None of these
Q17
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle of the side
of the table. All the information is not necessarily
in the same order. Only three persons sit
between V and R. W sits immediate left of S. S
sits second to the left of V, who is not sitting at
the corner of the table. The number of persons

sitting between S and Q is the same as the
number of persons sitting between T and S. The
one who sits opposite V is immediate right of Q.
P sits second to the right of W. U sits immediate
right of T but do not sit on the longer side of the
table.
 
What is the position of Q with respect to U?
(A) Second to the right
(B) Third to the right
(C) Immediate right
(D) Fourth to the left
(E) None of these

of the table. All the information is not necessarily

sits second to the left of V, who is not sitting at

sitting between S and Q is the same as the
number of persons sitting between T and S. The
one who sits opposite V is immediate right of Q.
P sits second to the right of W. U sits immediate
right of T but do not sit on the longer side of the
table.
 
Who among the following person seated at the
corner of the table?
(A) S
(B) V
(C) W
(D) U
(E) None of these

Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of

four of them are seated in the middle of the side
of the table. All the information is not necessarily

immediate left of Q?
(A) V
(B) S
(C) R

(E) None of these

Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting

four of them are seated in the middle of the side
of the table. All the information is not necessarily

(B) W

(D) U

Q21
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle of the side
of the table. All the information is not necessarily
in the same order. T sits three places away from
W, who sits in the corner of the table. Only one
person sits between W and P, who is an
immediate neighbour of T. The number of
persons sitting between P and U is the same as
the number of persons sitting between W and S,
who sit adjacent to T. R sits second to the left of
V, who is not an immediate neighbour of S. T is
not sitting second to the right of V. Q sits
immediate right of W.
 
Four of the next five are similar in some way
and thus form a group. Find the student who
does not belong to that group.
(A) S
(B) P
(C) Q
(D) W
(E) U
Q22
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle of the side
of the table. All the information is not necessarily
in the same order. T sits three places away from
W, who sits in the corner of the table. Only one
person sits between W and P, who is an
immediate neighbour of T. The number of
persons sitting between P and U is the same as
the number of persons sitting between W and S,
who sit adjacent to T. R sits second to the left of
V, who is not an immediate neighbour of S. T is
not sitting second to the right of V. Q sits
immediate right of W.
 
How many persons sit between V and S, when
counted from right of S?
(A) 1
(B) 3
(C) 2
(D) 4
(E) 5

Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting

them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle of the side
of the table. All the information is not necessarily

Who 
among 
the 
following 
friends 
sits

(B) S
(C) Q
(D) V

Q24
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and

not sitting second to the right of V. Q sits

Who among the following is adjacent to T?
(A) R
(B) V
(C) P
(D) Q
(E) U
Q25
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle of the side
of the table. All the information is not necessarily
in the same order. T sits three places away from
W, who sits in the corner of the table. Only one
person sits between W and P, who is an
immediate neighbour of T. The number of
persons sitting between P and U is the same as

not sitting second to the right of V. Q sits
immediate right of W.
 
Who among the following sits opposite to R?
(A) S
(B) P
(C) Q
(D) W
(E) T
Q26
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle side of the
table. All the information is not necessarily in the
same order. Two persons sit between T and U,
who sits on the shorter side of the table. P sits
second to the left of T. Q is not an immediate
neighbour of T. R sits opposite U. S sits second to
the left of P. The number of persons sitting
between U and Q is the same as the number of
persons sitting between Q and R. W sits second
to the right of T. V is not an immediate neighbour
of W.
 
How many persons sit between P and Q when
counted to the right of Q?
(A) 1
(B) 2
(C) 3
(D) 4
(E) 5
Q27
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle side of the
table. All the information is not necessarily in the
same order. Two persons sit between T and U,
who sits on the shorter side of the table. P sits
second to the left of T. Q is not an immediate
neighbour of T. R sits opposite U. S sits second to
the left of P. The number of persons sitting
between U and Q is the same as the number of
persons sitting between Q and R. W sits second
to the right of T. V is not an immediate neighbour
of W.
 
What is the position of V with respect to Q?
(A) Second to the right
(B) Third to the right
(C) Immediate right
(D) Fourth to the left
(E) Fourth to the right
Q28

Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle side of the
table. All the information is not necessarily in the
same order. Two persons sit between T and U,
who sits on the shorter side of the table. P sits
second to the left of T. Q is not an immediate
neighbour of T. R sits opposite U. S sits second to
the left of P. The number of persons sitting
between U and Q is the same as the number of
persons sitting between Q and R. W sits second
to the right of T. V is not an immediate neighbour
of W.
 
Who among the following person seated at the
corner of the table?
(A) V
(B) S
(C) R
(D) U
(E) Q
Q29
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Eight persons- P, Q, R, S, T, U, V, and W are sitting
at the rectangular table facing the center. Four of
them are seated at the corner of the table and
four of them are seated in the middle side of the
table. All the information is not necessarily in the
same order. Two persons sit between T and U,
who sits on the shorter side of the table. P sits
second to the left of T. Q is not an immediate
neighbour of T. R sits opposite U. S sits second to
the left of P. The number of persons sitting
between U and Q is the same as the number of
persons sitting between Q and R. W sits second
to the right of T. V is not an immediate neighbour
of W.
 
Who among the following person seated
second to the right of the one who is
immediate left of R?
(A) U
(B) P
(C) Q
(D) W
(E) T
Q30
Study the following information and answer
the given questions.
 
Twelve people are sitting around a rectangular-
shaped table facing inwards. One person is
sitting at one corner each and two people are
sitting along each side. No one among Q, U, or Z
is sitting at the corner of the table. Only one
person is sitting between P and S. O is sitting
third to the right of N and is sitting second to the
left of V. The number of people sitting between
U and Q when counted from the left of Q is not
more than three. Only three people are sitting
between P and Y, who is not sitting along the
longer side of the table. Five people are sitting
between S and R, who is sitting third to the right
of T. Only one person is sitting between Y and N,
who is not sitting along the longer side of the
table. X is sitting in one of the corners of the
table and is sitting immediately to the left of R.
The number of people sitting between Z and Q is
one more than the number of people sitting
between X and O.
 
Which of the following statements is correct?
(A) Five people are sitting between T and Q.
(B) Z and R are sitting adjacent to each other.
(C) S is sitting third to the left of Q.
(D) Four people are sitting between P and O.
(E) Both (a) and (d)
Q31
Study the following information and answer
the given questions.
 
Twelve people are sitting around a rectangular-
shaped table facing inwards. One person is
sitting at one corner each and two people are
sitting along each side. No one among Q, U, or Z
is sitting at the corner of the table. Only one

person is sitting between P and S. O is sitting
third to the right of N and is sitting second to the
left of V. The number of people sitting between
U and Q when counted from the left of Q is not
more than three. Only three people are sitting
between P and Y, who is not sitting along the
longer side of the table. Five people are sitting
between S and R, who is sitting third to the right
of T. Only one person is sitting between Y and N,
who is not sitting along the longer side of the
table. X is sitting in one of the corners of the
table and is sitting immediately to the left of R.
The number of people sitting between Z and Q is
one more than the number of people sitting
between X and O.
 
Who among the following is not sitting in the
corner of the table?
(A) P
(B) N
(C) X
(D) O
(E) T
Q32
Study the following information and answer
the given questions.
 
Twelve people are sitting around a rectangular-
shaped table facing inwards. One person is
sitting at one corner each and two people are
sitting along each side. No one among Q, U, or Z
is sitting at the corner of the table. Only one
person is sitting between P and S. O is sitting
third to the right of N and is sitting second to the
left of V. The number of people sitting between
U and Q when counted from the left of Q is not
more than three. Only three people are sitting
between P and Y, who is not sitting along the
longer side of the table. Five people are sitting
between S and R, who is sitting third to the right
of T. Only one person is sitting between Y and N,
who is not sitting along the longer side of the
table. X is sitting in one of the corners of the
table and is sitting immediately to the left of R.
The number of people sitting between Z and Q is
one more than the number of people sitting
between X and O.
 
Who among the following is related to N in the
same way as P is related to R?
(A) T
(B) Z
(C) R
